channel.title: SPL - Broadview Branch
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Broadview Branch

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Monday, March 16, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Artist Playground
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Broadview Branch

Kids aged 5-11! Get your artistic energy out at this open play art space! 

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, March 17, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year. 

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Teen Tutoring
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 3 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Weekly Homework Help sessions, just for teens! Reserved for students in grades 9-12.  

Event details

item.title: Tea & Tech Time
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Broadview Branch

Need some 1:1 time to figure out your tech? Join us for drop in tech help!

Event details

item.title: Teen Writing Series: FIRE
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

9th-12th graders! Join us for our new teen writing workshop series: The FIRE (The Fearless Ideas wRiting Experience).

Event details

item.title: Baby Story Time
item.description:
Friday, March 20, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

At storytime, kids ages 0-18 months and their families can enjoy stories, songs, and fun learning activities.

Event details

item.title: Device Donation Drop-off
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Broadview Branch

Have an old laptop you’ve been meaning to get rid of? Drop off your old electronics for free!

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Adult Tutoring
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Broadview Branch

Meet with a volunteer tutor one-on-one or in a small group for help with basic skills for English, writing, math, citizenship interview and exam, and high school completion.

Event details

item.title: Game on! Board Games for All Ages
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Calling all board gamers. Join us and play a game or two.

Event details

item.title: Broadview Bands: Traditional Irish Music
item.description:
Saturday, March 21, 2026 at 3:30 PM

Location: Broadview Branch

It's a St Patrick's Day post-party & celebration of Irish Heritage Month as Ming Chen & group thrill with beautiful Irish tunes.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Homework Help
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 4 PM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room

Homework Help volunteers will be at this branch to assist K-12 students with school assignments during the school year.

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Wednesday, March 25, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Broadview Branch, Meeting Room
